1.0.1.en: V3 support finetuning and workflow triggering bug fix

1.0.2.en: Added fault states and workflows and insights

1.0.6.en: More V3 tweaks due to different registers

1.0.7.en: Small mapping bug in charge state

1.0.8.en: Power negative inverted to match Homey standard

1.0.9.en: handle missing firmware register for V3 better

1.0.11.en: Removed deprecated set charge power workflow actions

1.0.12.en: flow formatting fixes and build in delay for mode switch

1.1.0.en: Improve connection management for timeouts and retry patterns

1.1.1.en: Added support for bypassmode and extra mode change token

1.1.2.en: Deprecated action card and updated social links

1.1.6.en: Fix on force soc control ui

1.1.7.en: Added ip and slave id config in add wizard

1.2.0.en: Added Homey target_power capability for standard energy management (requires Homey >=12.13.0)

1.3.2.en: modbus package and idle battery bug

1.3.3.en: Diagnostic ringbuffer for work-mode write/read latency, viewable in settings

1.3.4.en: Hot-path optimizations for sustained target_power writes from external orchestrators

1.3.5.en: Fix periodic drop to 0W during sustained charging by refreshing the firmware power-countdown (force-control keepalive)

1.3.6.en: Extend the force-control keepalive to force_soc, force_charge and force_discharge modes (1.3.5 only covered target_power)

1.3.7.en: Also refresh RS485 control flag 42000 in the keepalive - idempotent re-writes of 42010 alone did not refresh the firmware countdown

1.3.8.en: Replace keepalive with fast-check auto-recovery: detect unsolicited 42010 reverts within ~1s and re-assert (bounds 0W dips); enforce 2s minimum poll interval and add overlap guard

1.3.9.en: Fix force_soc auto-recovery: re-trigger via 42011 (the firmware's write-and-act register) instead of 42010, and skip when SOC has reached its target

1.3.10.en: Detect partial reverts (power register zeroed with 42010 still engaged), update target_power capability immediately on recovery for faster chart updates, and remove a race-condition logging artifact

1.3.11.en: Stability fix: revert v1.3.10's second fast-check Modbus read which overloaded the Marstek bus and caused device-wide timeouts. Keeps the race-fix and immediate capability update from v1.3.10.

1.3.12.en: Serialize all Modbus operations through a per-client mutex. Prevents user-driven writes from colliding with the slow poll on the TCP connection, which on some setups caused minute-long timeout cascades.
